text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
YeeaahпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ Guess you can't read it when 
it's that messed up. Wonder what it said.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No worries! 
Umm, let's see вҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: "гҖҮпј…Г—пјғгҖҒпј„пјҠв–іпјҶв–Ў ОЁвҲӮвҲӮОЁгҖҒОҰПүОҰвҖ”вҖ”" Greetings, earthling! Thanks for the other day!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, what a marvelous messageвҳҶ 
Then I'll reply with вҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: "РҘРҘО”гҖҶвҷӯгҖҮОЁвҳҶ пҝ пҝЎпј…гҖҒв…Ұв—ҺвҲөгҖ“В§вҳҶвҳ…вҳҶ" Likewise! Visit Earth again soon, ok?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I wasn't able to read any of it! 
But waitвҖҰвҖҰ who's that you're messagingпҪһ!?
